title: Spectrophotometric Determination of Uranium by Galangin
author: Mohan Katyal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The use of 3, 5. 7-trihydroxyllavone (galangin) as an analytical reagent for the estimation of uranium has horn in The reagent forms a water-soluble orange complex with uranium. One to ten p. p. m. of uranium can be satisfactorily estimated spectrophotometrically at 45Cmμ. pH of the solutions being adjusted in the range 4.5 and 8.0. Molar composition of the complex has been found to be 1:1.
steps_raw: The use of 3, 5. 7-trihydroxyllavone (galangin) as an analytical reagent for the estimation of uranium has horn in The reagent forms a water-soluble orange complex with uranium.
